description: Tobias Sammet created Avantasia and is the central songwriter/vocalist.
Tobias Sammet is the vocalist/frontman of Edguy.
Recurring Avantasia guest vocalist; especially important in the post-Metal Opera era.
Jørn Lande is strongly associated with Masterplan as a lead vocalist.
Jørn fronted Ark, one of his notable progressive-metal affiliations.
Jørn was involved with Beyond Twilight.
Early hard-rock affiliation in Jørn's career.
Jørn was associated with The Snakes.
Jorn/JORN is Jørn Lande's solo band/project.
Jørn is one half of the Allen/Lande studio collaboration.
Russell Allen is the other lead vocalist in Allen/Lande.
Russell Allen is best known as vocalist of Symphony X.
Magnus Karlsson is a key creative link in the Allen/Lande project.
Russell Allen appears in the Avantasia guest-vocalist universe.
Magnus Karlsson has been associated with Primal Fear.
Ralf Scheepers is vocalist of Primal Fear.
Ralf Scheepers appears as an Avantasia guest vocalist.
Ralf Scheepers was an early Gamma Ray vocalist.
Kai Hansen founded Gamma Ray.
Kai Hansen was a founding Helloween member.
Kai Hansen is an early Avantasia guest.
Michael Kiske is a major Helloween vocalist.
Michael Kiske sang in Unisonic.
Kai Hansen joined Kiske in Unisonic.
Michael Kiske is the lead voice of Place Vendome.

Michael Kiske is one of Avantasia's most defining and recurring guest singers.
Amanda Somerville has been a frequent Avantasia live/backing vocalist and collaborator.
Sascha Paeth is a core Avantasia guitarist/producer collaborator.

Bridge: Marko Hietala and Floor Jansen share the Nightwish orbit.

Masterplan connects to Helloween through former Helloween guitarist Roland Grapow and the German power-metal scene.
Helloween and Gamma Ray are linked through Kai Hansen.
Major European power-metal bands frequently linked in listener and festival scenes.
Kamelot and Seven Spires share the modern symphonic-metal scene and Avantasia 2025 guest orbit.
